articles.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
articles.summary: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows, enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions.

articles.title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
articles.summary: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats.

articles.title: How finance teams use Codex
articles.summary: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.

articles.title: How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex
articles.summary: Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments.

articles.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
articles.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.

articles.title: AutoScout24 scales engineering with AI-powered workflows
articles.summary: Learn how AutoScout24 Group uses Codex and ChatGPT to speed development cycles, improve code quality, and expand AI adoption.
